_comment: Master config for this client site. Every value here is client-specific. Edit this file, run scripts/setup_client.py, then push.

brand.name: Austin Area Roofers
brand.tagline: Roofer of Integrity. One name on every job.

founder.name: Benny
founder.title: Master Roofer · Founder
founder.bio_short: Benny has installed roofs in Central Texas since he was eighteen. Twenty-seven years on the trade. Seven thousand Austin homes protected. He walks every estimate himself. No franchise crews, no day labor, no subcontracted strangers on your property.
founder.bio_long: Benny started at eighteen. Forty-five now. Twenty-seven straight years on roofs and nothing else. He works twenty-five days a month, takes Sunday off, and is on a job every other one.
signature_skills: Water-flow engineering on Hill Country pitches
Hand-built crickets behind every chimney and roof penetration
Custom welded flashings, copper-leaded chimney work, and hand-set lead boots
Standing seam metal hand-folded, hand-snapped, and hand-welded at every transition
Historic Central Texas re-roofs across Tarrytown, Pemberton Heights, Old Enfield
Two-layer underlayment and six-nail-per-shingle high-wind specifications

second_founder.name: Dennis White
second_founder.title: Co-Founder · Operations
second_founder.bio_short: Dennis cut his teeth in roofing in 2005, in the storm-recovery wake of Hurricanes Rita and Katrina. Three years working roofs in Beaumont, Texas. He came home to Austin to build the operation alongside his brother-in-law Benny.
second_founder.background: Dennis runs operations, customer experience, and the REPS family of companies.

company_story.headline: A family-built Central Texas roofing crew. One name on every roof.
company_story.narrative: REPS of Texas is a family-built operation founded by Benny and his brother-in-law Dennis. Twenty-seven years of master-tier craftsmanship. Every install carries Benny's name. Every estimate is walked by Benny personally. No subcontracted strangers, no franchise crews, no day-labor.

certifications.name: BBB Accredited Business
certifications.note: Accredited with the Better Business Bureau.

signature_specialties.name: Custom Metalwork · Hand-Built On-Site
signature_specialties.summary: Chimney crickets, copper-leaded chimney flashings, hand-welded penetration details. Every piece cut, folded, and welded on your driveway.

signature_specialties.name: Standing Seam Metal · 22-Gauge
signature_specialties.summary: Snap-lock and concealed-fastener systems in 22-gauge G90 galvalume. 40-50 years of service life. Class 4 impact rated.

tracking._note: WhatConverts profile lives at app.whatconverts.com. GA4 lives under hello@rankonmaps.io. IndexNow key file must match the value and be saved at site/<KEY>.txt + site/.indexnow-key.txt

deploy._note: Both secrets must be set under repo Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions. ROM Cloudflare account ID is in 1Password (entry: ROM Cloudflare).

service_areas_summary: Austin and the surrounding Central Texas metro. A seventy-five mile service radius across Travis County and Williamson County.
